CORK.

Lees and Nils thet at Cork Athletic
Grounds on Sunday in their football tie
in the County Championship. A good
deal of interest was evinced in the match,
Nils proved the better side, especially in
the ground play, and won by 4 points
to2.

In the Intermediate Division of the
North-east Cork Championship final,
Castletownroche beat Mallow by 3-1 to
2-2. on Sunday at Fermoy.

NORTH TIPPERARY.
Tipperary County Board selected the
hurling team which met Cork at Dun-
garvan for the Munster Championship on
Sunday week. It is believed that if the
selection were left to Toomevara, Tip-
perary would not only come out on top,
but would easily win the the All-Ireland
Championship. Toomevara was never in
such form before, but the meddling of the
County Board snatched their chance of
All-Ireland honours from the famous Toom
urlers. With the County Board’s inter-
tention has come the early defeat of Tip-
verary. So much for official offciousness.
—# Midland Tribune.”
